description: Partnership / Joint Venture Agreement - governs formation, governance, profit sharing, and dissolution of business partnerships

partnership_metadata.description: Basic agreement identification and formation details

agreement_title.description: Official title of the partnership or joint venture agreement

effective_date.description: Date the partnership agreement becomes effective

partnership_name.description: Legal name of the partnership or joint venture entity

formation_jurisdiction.description: State or country where the partnership is formed or registered

registered_office.description: Principal office or registered address of the partnership

governing_law.description: Jurisdiction whose laws govern the agreement

term_years.description: Duration of the partnership in years

purpose_of_partnership.description: Stated business purpose or objective of the partnership

partners.description: Details of each partner including contributions and ownership
List of all partners in the partnership or joint venture

legal_name.description: Full legal name of the partner

capital_contribution_amount.description: Monetary value of the partner's initial capital contribution

ownership_percentage.description: Percentage ownership interest in the partnership

voting_rights_percentage.description: Percentage of voting rights held by the partner

address.description: Business or registered address of the partner

governance.description: Management structure, decision-making, and governance provisions

managing_partner.description: Name of the designated managing partner, if any

decision_making.description: Default voting threshold for partnership decisions

matters_requiring_unanimous_consent.description: List of decisions that require agreement of all partners
extraction_hints: shall not without the approval of all

meetings_frequency.description: How often partnership meetings are held

quorum_requirement.description: Minimum attendance or representation required for valid meetings
extraction_hints: present in person or by proxy

board_or_committee_structure.description: Description of any advisory boards, steering committees, or management committees

deadlock_resolution_mechanism.description: Process for resolving deadlocks or impasses in partner decision-making

financial_provisions.description: Profit/loss allocation, distributions, capital calls, and accounting

profit_sharing_ratio.description: Ratio or formula for allocating profits among partners

loss_sharing_ratio.description: Ratio or formula for allocating losses among partners

distribution_frequency.description: How often profits are distributed to partners

distribution_priority.description: Waterfall or priority order for distributing partnership proceeds

capital_call_provisions.description: Rules and process for requesting additional capital from partners

additional_capital_contribution_obligati.description: Whether and under what circumstances partners must contribute additional capital
extraction_hints: no partner shall be required to contribute additional

reserves_policy.description: Policy for maintaining cash reserves before distributions

fiscal_year_end.description: End date of the partnership's fiscal year

accounting_method.description: Accounting method used by the partnership

audit_requirements.description: Requirements for financial audits of the partnership

tax_treatment.description: How the partnership is treated for tax purposes

operations.description: Scope of business, territory, exclusivity, and operational commitments

scope_of_business.description: Description of the business activities the partnership will conduct

territory.description: Geographic territory in which the partnership operates

exclusivity_obligations.description: Whether partners are restricted from engaging in competing activities

non_compete_during_term.description: Non-compete restrictions applicable during the partnership term

key_person_provisions.description: Requirements for specific individuals to remain involved in the partnership

employees_and_staffing.description: Provisions regarding employees, hiring, and staffing of the partnership

resource_commitments.description: Specific resources each partner commits to the partnership

partner.description: Name of the partner committing the resource

resource_type.description: Type of resource committed (e.g., personnel, equipment, technology, facilities)

intellectual_property.description: IP ownership, licensing, and technology contributions

background_ip_ownership.description: Treatment of intellectual property each partner brings to the partnership

jointly_developed_ip.description: Ownership and rights to IP created jointly during the partnership

ip_licensing_between_partners.description: License grants between partners for use of each other's IP

brand_usage_rights.description: Rights to use partnership or partner trademarks and branding

technology_contributions.description: Technology, software, or know-how contributed by partners

transfer_and_exit.description: Transfer restrictions, buyout provisions, and exit mechanisms

transfer_restrictions.description: Restrictions on transferring or assigning partnership interests

right_of_first_refusal.description: Right of existing partners to purchase interests before outside parties

tag_along_rights.description: Right of minority partners to join in a sale by majority partners

drag_along_rights.description: Right of majority partners to compel minority partners to join a sale

buyout_provisions.description: Terms for buying out a departing or removed partner

trigger_events.description: Events that trigger a buyout right or obligation

valuation_method.description: Method for determining the value of the departing partner's interest

payment_terms.description: How and when the buyout amount is paid

lock_up_period_months.description: Minimum period during which partners cannot transfer their interests

voluntary_withdrawal_notice_days.description: Number of days notice required for a partner to voluntarily withdraw

involuntary_removal_grounds.description: Grounds upon which a partner may be involuntarily removed

dissolution.description: Events triggering dissolution, winding up, and post-dissolution provisions

dissolution_events.description: Events or circumstances that trigger dissolution of the partnership

winding_up_process.description: Process and responsibilities for winding up partnership affairs

asset_distribution_priority.description: Priority order for distributing partnership assets upon dissolution

survival_clauses.description: Provisions that survive the dissolution or termination of the partnership

non_compete_post_dissolution.description: Non-compete restrictions applicable after the partnership ends

duration_months.description: Duration of the post-dissolution non-compete period in months

geographic_scope.description: Geographic area covered by the post-dissolution non-compete

liability_and_indemnification.description: Partner liability, indemnification, insurance, and liability limits

partner_liability.description: How liability is allocated among partners

indemnification_obligations.description: Obligations of the partnership or partners to indemnify each other

insurance_requirements.description: Insurance coverage the partnership or partners must maintain

limitation_of_liability.description: Caps or limitations on partner liability

capital_contribution_as_maximum_loss.description: Whether a partner's maximum loss is limited to their capital contribution
